Browserbase makes the web as reliable and programmable as APIs Get API key Copy prompt 10,000+ companies building beyond the API Read the story Read the story Read the story See what agents can do on the web. From login to task completion, Browserbase powers agents that reliably operate on the web. Search API Web search, built for agents. Let your Agent quickly find relevant websites based on a single query. Try for free Fetch API Quickly fetch web context for your agent by converting any URL into HTML, JSON or markdown Try for free Browser-as-a-Service Give your agent a real browser to use the web like a human. Navigating interactive website and performing complex actions, without interruptions. Try for free Use the whole web like it’s an API. Use the whole web like it’s an API. The browser is the web’s native interface. Now your agents can use it seamlessly to deliver new possibilities. Your BRIDGE between AI and the DIGITAL WORLD Handles auth, flows, dynamic content Mirrors human interaction Adjusts to updates and changes Navigates unpredictable UI Works everywhere Anything you can do in a browser, your agent can too. Automate what’s tedious. Accelerate what’s ambitious. Build agents that never sleep Send your agent to search, organize, and act on data while you do literally anything else. Spin up a browser, connect your model, and execute your first task Create a browser session Spin up a browser instance, configure your environment, and prepare it to run tasks across the web. Choose your model Connect AI to the browser session so it can interpret pages, make decisions, and drive interactions autonomously.
